name: Conduit
short_desc: Conduit is a simple, fast and reliable chat server written in Rust
description: Conduit is a fast Matrix homeserver that’s easy to set up and just works. You can install it on a mini-computer like the Raspberry Pi to host Matrix for your family, friends or company.

form_fields.label: Allow Registration
form_fields.hint: WARNING! First user will be admin

form_fields.label: Loggin Level
form_fields.hint: Available levels: error, warn, info, debug, trace

form_fields.label: TURN URIs
form_fields.hint: List of TURN server URIs turn:/turns:

author: Timo Kösters
